rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PAUL GREGORY MITCHELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required on the sole issue of whether this petition should be taken off calendar for lack of progress, as the following issues e-mailed to counsel on 07/05/2022 remain unaddressed: 1) No DE-121 form with a copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6) attached is on file. 2) Item 2d(2) of the petition must be checked. 3) Item 3d(1) & (2)(b): Please provide brief descriptions of the $250,000 personal property. Annual gross income therefrom must be stated at item (2)(b) and added to the total. 4) Item 3g(2)(a) must be checked. 5) Item 8: Direct notice must be given to Jeanne Serrano. See CRC 7.51(a)(2) (c/o is not generally allowed). See also Probate Code section 1215(a)(3). 6) If the decedent's siblings (including half-siblings) identified at item 8 have not declined to serve as co-administrator or consented to the petitioner's appointment as sole administrator, the petition must indicate the reason. LRSF 14.24. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOUIS BERT ROVENS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Please review Local Rule 14.1 D. for information regarding remote appearances. To appear by Zoom use the Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 and Password: 514879 1) Whether to take the matter off calendar for failure to respond to the examiner notes since July 22, 2022. 2) Examiner Notes: a. There appears to be a conflict of interest with the proposed personal representative. b. Trustee of the trust is not named on page 4 under #8. c. Petitioner did not select in the caption authorization to administer under the IAEA. d. Must file Proof of Publication (Probate Code 8120 et seq.) e. Must give 15 days' notice and file DE-121 and include the required language in Local Rule 14.1 D. 6) f. Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] g. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BARBARA A. LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/01/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) 15 day's notice must be re-done and include the language required by Local Rule 14.1 D. 6) 2) Please file a DE-147 with all required information including the proposed personal representative's phone number. 3) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] 4) The petitioner did not select a required item on the petition page 3 #5a. (7) or (8). 5) Petitioner did not list all beneficiaries of the trust on page 4 under #8. Where the personal representative and the sole trustee are the same person the beneficiaries of the trust must be clearly identified. Probate Code 1208(b). [LRSF 14.18 C. 2)] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/18/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAMONA LOPEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/01/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Please explain the 10 year delay in filing the probate. 2) 15 day's notice must be re-done and include the language required by Local Rule 14.1 D. 6) 3) Rogelio Lopez has not filed a waiver of bond so full bond will be required unless a waiver of bond is filed. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/18/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
